reference: Hello, welcome to the clinic. In my opinion, just keep trying and do not focus on whether your menstrual cycles are regular or irregular, as this is a natural phenomenon and does not require any treatment. It depends on compatibility. I hope this information helps.
text: Hello, welcome to the clinic. In my opinion, just keep trying and do not focus on whether your menstrual cycles are regular or irregular, as this is a natural phenomenon and does not require any treatment. It depends on compatibility. I hope this information helps.
